interpretation: Voucher disputes, website problems, and purchase/payment friction reflect transactional low service quality.
Wrong items, sizing problems, and product-quality complaints reflect fulfilment failure and poor purchase outcomes.
Gift-card disputes, refund problems, and payment recovery difficulties reflect repeated unresolved negative experience.
Rude staff, poor support, and failed complaint handling indicate frontline customer-service breakdowns.
Delivery delays, non-receipt, and parcel problems indicate logistics-related low service quality.
Returns, refund disputes, and repeated contact attempts indicate unresolved recovery failure and accumulated negative past experience.
Gift-card and store-credit disputes indicate payment and restitution service failures.
Store manager, receipt, and policy issues reflect in-store service quality breakdowns.
Poor product quality and cheapness reflect core product-related service failure.
Shipping and fulfilment delays indicate operational low service quality in online ordering.
